description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Find Service Accounts - Added search box to filter results across all columns in real time
- Find Service Accounts - Added Include scheduled tasks checkbox for a faster services-only scan
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Find Service Accounts - Increased concurrent computer scans from 5 to 15, significantly improving speed on large OUs
- Create Bulk Users (Import) - Preview Import is now instant; AD validation runs only during the actual import
- Navigation - Tool category buttons now stay highlighted when a tool within that category is selected
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- No bug fixes in this release
